description: MCP servers for Terragrunt/OpenTofu infrastructure-as-code projects (memores-infrastructure). Includes HCL validation, state inspection, AWS resource queries, and documentation indexing.

filesystem.description: Read, search, and list files. Free. Requires Node.js/npx.

git.description: Built-in. Git log, diff, blame, status, branch, show. Zero dependencies.

memory.description: Built-in. Persistent knowledge graph: remember, recall, forget. Zero dependencies.

thinking.description: Sequential thinking for complex multi-step reasoning. Free. Requires Node.js/npx.

lsp.description: Built-in. Python code intelligence: find definitions, references, list symbols, get code context.

headroom.description: Context compression via Headroom. Tools: headroom_compress, headroom_retrieve, headroom_stats. Uses running proxy at port 8787.

terraform-registry.description: Interacts with the Terraform Registry API to search modules, providers, and fetch argument details.

terragrunt-docs.description: Real-time Terragrunt document context provider and repository issue tracker via Deno.

codebase-memory.description: Persistent local code knowledge graph via Tree-Sitter AST parsing. Run the official curl-to-bash installation script before enabling.
